issues.objection: Tags on 7.23 (essence-vs-implementation, long-term-thinking, first-principles) cohere with same-tag verses across chapters. Coheres with 2.42-2.45's critique of metric-fixation (bounded targets for bounded effort); coheres with 4.18's substrate-vs-surface action-in-inaction. STRETCHED tagging keeps the operational scope honest where metaphysical reach exceeds it. This verse is sharp and operationally robust (per chapter-7 thesis: STRONG operational analog).

notes: Doctrine-coherence test for 7.23: same-tag verses across chapters preserve consistent stance; the verse extends the doctrine without contradicting prior chapters. PASS.
